revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-355

1. That property of an antenna by virtue of which it radiates or receives more strongly in some directions than in others.

Reference: B.S.

2. This term is also used in the U.S.A. for Power gain (4-1-365).


{{IALAFooter}}
